title: Tales of Silta
description: A survival, multiplayer friendly datapack all about magic spells, wands, wizardry, fantasy races, lore, fighting evil bosses and exploration of ancient structures.
body:
1.20.4 - 26.1 datapack
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Need help, wanna send feedback or just share your stories?
Join Discord server [here](https://discord.gg/xhjm3Ef2v9)
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Did you ever wish to cast powerful spells upon your enemies?
Are you a fan of exploring?
Would you like to challenge a friend in a duel of wizards?
Do you like magic systems that fit well into minecraft?
Or do you feel like an cultist from the nether?

Well then this is the datapack you are searching for.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------

This datapack adds 9 new races, 63 new spells, various magical items and rituals.

6 new bosses, vanilla friendly feel and a few new structures to explore

Everything works in multiplayer (and is made to be enjoyed with friends) and 
~~almost~~ everything is obtainable in survival.
**Resourcepack required!**

Multiple languages support:
EN - original;
CZ - by me;
IT - TheDiegoni;
ES - [rixzrosez ](https://www.twitch.tv/rixzrosez );
KA_GE - upcoming;


Happy exploring!
